description: Rename image after pasting, support name pattern and auto renaming.

manifest.author: Reorx

manifest.name: Paste image rename

name: Paste image rename

releases.author: reorx
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix "Always add duplicate number" option not working (#34)
* fix typo: `Alwasy` to `Always` by @omeiirr in https://github.com/reorx/obsidian-paste-image-rename/pull/36

## New Contributors
* @omeiirr made their first contribution in https://github.com/reorx/obsidian-paste-image-rename/pull/36

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/reorx/obsidian-paste-image-rename/compare/1.6.0...1.6.1

releases.author: reorx
releases.description:
Fixed:
- Markdown image link not replaced after the file is renamed, affecting #11, #12, #13, #24

    This problem has been there for a very long time, I first wanted to say sorry to all the people who
    encountered this problem. I didn't have much idea about how to solve it before,
    partly because the way I tried to match and replace the Wikilink or Markdown link
    went the wrong way, which was not only complicated but also very inconsistent.
    Today I finally fixed this issue by using the Obsidian API `FileManager.generateMarkdownLink`,
    thanks to all of you who attended the discussion on the relevant issues,
    you are patient and tolerant and provided detailed information for me to work it out.

New:
- Add the following template variables:
    - `{{firstHeading}}`: the headline of the Markdown file, `# My Heading` results in `My Heading` for this variable. (#26)
    - `{{dirName}}`: the directory name of the Markdown file. (#31)
    - `{{frontmatter:VAR}}`: any variable in the frontmatter, for example, `{{frontmatter:noteid}}` results in the value of `noteid` in the frontmatter. (#21)
- Add new settings option: `dupNumberAlways`. If enabled, duplicate number will always be added to the image name. Otherwise, it will only be added when the name is duplicated. (#27)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/reorx/obsidian-paste-image-rename/compare/1.5.2...1.6.0

releases.author: reorx
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fixed "Handle all attachments" not working for drag'n drop and pasting files, which was actually caused by excludeExtensionPattern matched all extensions when its empty (#10)
* Corrected typo `valut` to `vault` seen at `Handle all attachments` by @wardoflores in https://github.com/reorx/obsidian-paste-image-rename/pull/15

## New Contributors
* @wardoflores made their first contribution in https://github.com/reorx/obsidian-paste-image-rename/pull/15

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/reorx/obsidian-paste-image-rename/compare/1.5.1...1.5.2

releases.author: reorx
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fixes date formats messing up everything after it by @saezhe in https://github.com/reorx/obsidian-paste-image-rename/pull/18
* Unicode characters in name, resolves #30, #28, #9 by @bessangel in https://github.com/reorx/obsidian-paste-image-rename/pull/32

## New Contributors
* @saezhe made their first contribution in https://github.com/reorx/obsidian-paste-image-rename/pull/18
* @bessangel made their first contribution in https://github.com/reorx/obsidian-paste-image-rename/pull/32

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/reorx/obsidian-paste-image-rename/compare/1.5.0...1.5.1
